[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows large black text on a white background reading “sibuk” in multiple lines.

Main Subject:
A block of text occupying most of the image, with four separate lines of large, bold, black letters.

Setting:

Visual Details:
The text is left-aligned and set in a thick, sans-serif style. Each line is clearly separated by vertical spacing, and the letters have crisp edges. The framing is tight, cutting off nothing obvious, and the overall composition is simple, with only text visible.

banget

Practical Summary:
This image displays the words “sibuk banget kaya pejabat” in large black text on a white background. No other visual elements are present.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
